news.headline: Ladder Capital Corp (NYSE: LADR) to report Q3 2024 results on October 24, 2024, with a conference call at 10am ET. Phone numbers: (877) 407-4018 (domestic) or (201) 689-8471 (international).
news.summary: Ladder Capital Corp (NYSE: LADR) has announced its plans to reveal the financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on Thursday, October 24, 2024, before the market opens. A conference call and webcast for investors is scheduled for 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to review the results. Those interested can join the conference call by dialing either (877) 407-4018 for domestic calls or (201) 689-8471 for international calls. Participants will need to provide identification when dialing in.

news.headline: Global market for Data Converters was $5.7B in 2023, projected to reach $7.9B by 2030 (4.8% CAGR). 103 characters.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Data Converters - Global Strategic Business Report" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global Data Converters market was valued at approximately US$5.7 Billion in 2023 with a projected growth to US$7.9 Billion by 2030, representing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.8% from 2023 to 2030. The report offers a detailed analysis of market trends, drivers, and predictions to assist in making well-informed business choices. The data converters market is witnessing significant growth.

news.headline: Expand North Star 9th edition ends with record international participation, UAE as a global hub for startups and investors.
news.summary: The UAE emerges as a leading destination for startups, potential unicorns, and investors, following the successful completion of the 9th edition of Expand North Star. This event boasted unprecedented global participation, solidifying its status as the world's most extensive startup and investment summit. The focus of this edition was on the transformative effects of AI on the future of various industries, attracting a record number of attendees and stakeholders keen on exploring the tech-driven opportunities unfolding in the evolving business landscape.

news.headline: Citi's Baldwin doubts further stock gains in the near future.
Central bank lowers rates by 0.25%, says disinflation process remains on course.
Factor Bioscience and Eterna Therapeutics partner to advance cell therapy for various diseases, as per 10/17/2024 press release.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, Factor Bioscience Inc. ("Factor") and Eterna Therapeutics Inc. ("Eterna") disclosed an exclusive license and collaboration deal to hasten the progress of cutting-edge cell therapy candidates for oncology, rare diseases.

news.headline: Infosys reports 3.1% sequential revenue growth and revises FY25 revenue guidance to 3.75%-4.50%; Margin guidance remains at 20%-22%
news.summary: Infosys, a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting based in Bengaluru, India, has revised its FY25 revenue guidance to a range of 3.75% to 4.50%. The company has retained its margin guidance at 20% to 22%. This update was announced on October 17, 2024. Infosys is listed on the National Stock Exchange of India (NSE: INFY), the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE: INFY), and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: INFY). The company has shown a strong and widespread growth performance.

news.headline: Eurozone inflation slowdown prompts ECB to slash rates consecutively for the first time since 2011, impacting 20 countries.
news.summary: Interest rates have been reduced by policymakers for the 20 eurozone countries in consecutive meetings, marking the first back-to-back rate cuts since 2011.

news.headline: ECB slashes rates for 3rd time to boost slowing economy.
Nutella® Biscuits collaborates with Betches Media for book club series; celebrating social interactions with #BiscuitsnBesties. (Characters: 115)
news.summary: Nutella Biscuits is engaging with fans through various platforms - from IRL events to podcasts. The initiative, known as Nutella #BiscuitsnBesties, is a celebration of book clubs, crafting clubs, and socializing. The collaboration with Betches Co-founders in Parsippany, N.J., has been a hit among fans. The series offers an opportunity for fans to come together and enjoy Nutella Biscuits while engaging in conversations and activities, creating a unique and enjoyable experience. The initiative has garnered significant attention and participation, making it a successful venture in promoting social engagement and product enjoyment.

news.headline: Lilypad Insurance Holdings acquires Centauri Specialty and National Insurance Companies on Sept. 30, 2024.
news.summary: A recent press release on October 17, 2024 reveals that Lilypad Insurance Holdings has completed the acquisition of Centauri Specialty Insurance Company and Centauri National Insurance Company. The acquisition was finalized on September 30, 2024. This development marks a significant milestone for Lilypad Insurance Holdings, expanding its portfolio with the addition of both companies. This strategic move demonstrates the company's commitment to growth and diversification in the insurance sector. The successful completion of the acquisition process showcases Lilypad Insurance Holdings' dedication to expanding its market presence and enhancing its offerings.

news.headline: Blackstone surpasses Q3 expectations: $1.108T AUM, $2.434B revenues, $1.279B DE, $1.18B fee-related earnings, $7.0B net performance revenue.
news.summary: Blackstone Inc (NYSE:BX) saw its shares rise after reporting third-quarter fiscal year segment revenues of $2.434 billion, slightly above the anticipated $2.408 billion. Distributable earnings (DE) increased by 6% compared to the previous year, reaching $1.279 billion. Fee-related earnings were up 5% to $1.18 billion, with a notable 8% decrease in the Real Estate segment, while rising 25% in the Credit & Insurance business and 9% in Private Equity.Net accrued performance revenue climbed to $7.0 billion in the quarter from $6.44 billion in the same quarter last year. Distributable earnings per share amounted to $1.01, marking a 7% year-over-year rise, surpassing the estimated $0.94. Assets under management grew by 10% year-over-year to $1.108 trillion, with inflows of $40.5 billion recorded in the quarter.The company declared a quarterly dividend per share of $0.86, payable on November 4, 2024.

news.headline: Venture Valley video game by Singleton Foundation is a finalist for Digital Innovation Experiences in Education, Art, & Culture.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024 in Pasadena, California, the Venture Valley video game, developed by the Singleton Foundation for Financial Literacy and Entrepreneurship, was recognized as a "Finalist" for Digital Innovation Experiences in Education, Art, & Culture in The 4th Annual competition. This accolade highlights the game's impact on promoting financial literacy and entrepreneurship. The game has garnered attention for its innovative approach, and the Foundation aims to continue its mission of education through interactive platforms.

news.headline: Solubag USA, Inc. gets strategic investment from Exit Ventures to boost global expansion and revenue growth.
news.summary: A press release issued on October 17, 2024, from Hallandale Beach, Florida, revealed that Solubag USA, Inc. secured new funding spearheaded by Exit Ventures, a prominent venture capital firm hailing from Utah. The investment aims to propel Solubag's international expansion efforts and fuel significant revenue increase. Notably, Solubag has patented its innovative technology...

news.headline: ECB: Labour cost pressures are set to continue easing gradually, with profits partially buffering their impact on inflation.
ECB: Domestic inflation is high and wages are rising at an elevated pace.
Traders hold ECB rate-cut bets steady, see 25bps in December.
Windtree receives istaroxime patent for Japan (Patent No. 7560134), aims to improve heart failure treatment with extended infusion.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, Windtree Therapeutics, Inc. (NasdaqCM: WINT), a biotechnology company, disclosed the granting of a patent in Japan for istaroxime, titled “Istaroxime-containing intravenous formulation for the treatment of heart failure (AHF).” This patent (No. 7560134) obtained on September 24, 2024, is valid until 2039. The patent aims to improve heart failure treatment by administering istaroxime intravenously with extended infusion times or in combination with other beneficial agents for AHF management, enhancing heart failure care and diastolic relaxation compared to traditional methods.

news.headline: Sienna finishes $150M offering of 4.436% Series D Senior Unsecured Debentures.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.8%, marking a significant decrease from the previous rate of 5.2%. This decrease suggests that more individuals are finding jobs and entering the workforce. Additionally, the report reveals that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the past month, surpassing the expectations of economists. These positive indicators reflect a strengthening labor market and a growing economy.

news.headline: ECB: We will continue applying flexibility in reinvesting redemptions coming due in PEPP portfolios with a view to countering risks to monetary policy transmission mechanisms related to the pandemic.
ECB: The ECB intends to discontinue reinvestments under PEPP at end of 2024.
ECB: We will keep policy rates sufficiently restrictive for as long as necessary.
ECB: The Eurosystem will no longer reinvests all of the principal payments from maturing securities purchased under PEPP, reducing PEPPportfolio by €7.5 billion per month on average.

ECB: Accordingly, interest rates on deposit facility, main refinancing operations and marginal lending facility will be decreased to 3.25%, 3.40% and 3.65% respectively, with effect from 23 october 2024.
ECB: APP and pandemic emergency purchase programme (PEPP) APP portfolio is declining at a measured and predictable pace, as Eurosystem no longer reinvests principal payments from maturing securities.
ECB: The inflation outlook is also affected by recent downside surprises in indicators of economic activity.
Bandwidth donates $100,000 for hurricane relief in W. N.C., offers 2:1 employee matching & invites customers to help.
news.summary: To rally the Bandwidth Community in North Carolina, Bandwidth Inc. has initiated several strategies, including a generous donation of $100,000 towards helping neighbors. Additionally, they have implemented a 2:1 employee matching program, extended support for employee volunteers, and invited customers to join the cause. These efforts, as part of their commitment to corporate social responsibility, aim to engage the broader community in supporting those in need in the Raleigh area.

news.headline: ECB: Domestic inflation remains high, as wages are still rising at an elevated pace.
ECB: Meanwhile, financing conditions remain restrictive.
ECB: The ECB is not pre-committing to a particular rate path.
ECB: Inflation outlook is also affected by recent downside surprises in indicators of economic activity.

ECB: In particular, our interest rate decisions will be based on assessment of inflation outlook in light of incoming economic and financial data, dynamics of underlying inflation and strength of monetary policy transmission.
ECB Interest Rate Actual 3.40% (Forecast 3.4%, Previous 3.65%)
ECB Deposit Rate Actual 3.25% (Forecast 3.25%, Previous 3.50%)
ECB: The ECB will continue to follow a data-dependent and meeting-by-meeting approach to determining appropriate level and duration of restriction.
LYB acquires APK, enhancing recycling tech in portfolio.
news.summary: A corporation has recently added new recycling technology to its range of services, further expanding its offerings in the sustainability sector. This move is aimed at integrating innovative solutions that enhance the company's ability to recycle waste materials. The latest technology brings advanced capabilities to the corporate portfolio, enabling the handling and recycling of a broader range of materials effectively. This strategic enhancement is part of the company's commitment to environmental conservation and sustainable practices. Through this advancement, the company now possesses cutting-edge recycling technology to process a larger volume of materials efficiently, thereby contributing significantly to reducing waste and promoting a more sustainable future. This development showcases the company's dedication to staying at the forefront of environmental initiatives by investing in state-of-the-art recycling technologies.

news.headline: FDA approved AbbVie's vyalev as the first subcutaneous 24-hour infusion for adults with advanced Parkinson’s disease.
Huawei unveils All-Optical Network White Paper for Smart Hotels at GITEX GLOBAL 2024 forum in Dubai.
news.summary: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates on October 17, 2024, Huawei unveiled the All-Optical Network Technical and Application White Paper for Smart Hotels at the GITEX GLOBAL 2024 event. This release occurred during a forum titled "Digital Smart Hotels, Creating Ultimate Experience for Guests." The white paper delves into trends and insights related to optimizing guest experiences in smart hotels.

news.headline: SpiderOak releases Aranya, open-source project for cyber protections in commercial and defense, on Oct. 17, 2024.
news.summary: In a press release dated October 17, 2024, SpiderOak, a prominent provider of zero-trust cybersecurity solutions tailored for advanced space and tactical edge operations, revealed the launch of their fundamental technology platform as an open-source initiative. This initiative, dubbed "Aranya," aims to provide access to a cutting-edge security technology platform.

news.headline: Preview for the upcoming Hamster Kombat Season 2 released; features new characters and over 20 exciting levels.
Investors show confidence in a Trump victory as election nears, but other factors may impact market sentiment shift.
news.summary: Recent market data suggests that there is growing confidence among investors that Donald Trump will emerge victorious in the upcoming election. However, it is important to note that there are other factors that could also be influencing this change in sentiment.

news.headline: Dresner Advisory released a 2024 study on Financial Consolidation, Close Management, and Financial Reporting Market.
news.summary: A report released today by Dresner Advisory Services in Nashua, New Hampshire, revealed key insights from the 2024 Financial Consolidation, Close Management, and Financial Reporting Market Study. This research is part of the acclaimed Wisdom of Crowds® series. The study focuses on financial consolidation systems that streamline the process of combining and aggregating financial data. The report provides valuable data and trends in the market for financial professionals.

news.headline: Equinor ASA (OSE: EQNR, NYSE: EQNR) announced a buy-back program for shares used in employee incentive programs.
news.summary: Details have been released regarding the buy-back initiative for Equinor ASA (OSE:EQNR, NYSE:EQNR). The program involves the acquisition of shares for utilization in employee and management share-based incentive schemes. Specific figures regarding the transactions have been disclosed.

news.headline: Creality's ShareFest held in Chicago on Oct 12, 2024, connected 3D printing fans to celebrate innovation.
news.summary: On October 12, 2024, Creality, a leading company in the worldwide 3D printing sector, organized a successful ShareFest in Chicago. The event aimed to bring together fans of 3D printing and highlight Creality's strong dedication to the industry.

news.headline: New CEO Mark Hara joins Layr for growth, bringing experience from insurtech startups to insurance carriers.
news.summary: Hara has been appointed to spearhead the next stage of growth for the company, drawing on extensive experience from insurtech startups to leading insurance firms. The announcement was made in Atlanta on October 17, 2024. Layr, the insurtech startup known for its use of artificial intelligence to tailor commercial insurance solutions for small businesses, is set to capitalize on Hara's expertise as it progresses forward.

news.headline: Partners are considering choices for Ammega, a conveyor-belts maker - Reports indicate.

Global antiseptic and disinfectant market projected to reach $61.2 billion by 2031 with 7.0% CAGR growth, driven by rising antimicrobial resistance, healthcare infections, and COVID-19 demands for effective solutions.
news.summary: The global antiseptic and disinfectant market is projected to grow at a CAGR of 7.0% from 2023 to 2031, with estimated sales revenue reaching US$61.2 billion by the end of 2031. Factors driving this growth include the rise of antimicrobial resistance, leading to a demand for advanced solutions, and the increasing prevalence of healthcare-associated infections. Industries beyond healthcare are also adopting stringent hygiene protocols, propelling market growth. The COVID-19 pandemic has emphasized the need for effective disinfection methods, leading to a surge in demand for antimicrobial products. Quaternary ammonium compounds dominate the market, with healthcare providers leading due to strict hygiene standards. North America leads the market, attributed to high healthcare standards and consumer awareness. Key players in the market include Novartis AG, 3M, Johnson & Johnson, and others.

news.headline: Indiana benefits from 188MW of new clean energy generation as Honeysuckle Solar project goes online, creating jobs and boosting economy.
news.summary: A new clean energy project, the Honeysuckle Solar project, has launched in New Carlisle, Indiana, generating a substantial 188 megawatts of energy. This initiative, under the Recharging American Energy program, branded as #Inovateussolar, aims to boost clean energy production in the region.

news.headline: Mantis Innovation named best for supplier satisfaction by ERCG for third time in four years in 2023 survey.
news.summary: Houston-based company Mantis Innovation has been acknowledged by the Energy Research Consulting Group (ERCG) as the top Aggregator/Broker/Consultant (ABC) for supplier satisfaction in 2023, marking the third recognition in four years. In a recent ERCG survey, Mantis was rated the best in overall supplier satisfaction amongst all participating suppliers. This accolade signifies Mantis’ consistent excellence in providing smart, sustainable solutions for facility performance. This recognition highlights the company's commitment to delivering exceptional service and fostering strong relationships with suppliers.

news.headline: Builders are building more condos and townhomes due to affordability crisis. 1 million single-family homes finished in 2023, 2nd highest since 2007–2009 crisis. Starts of attached single-family homes rose by 3%.
news.summary: Metropolitan areas experiencing accelerated growth in home prices have witnessed a notable uptick in building permits. In 2023, builders completed approximately 1 million single-family homes, marking the second-highest number post the 2007-2009 global financial crisis. There was a 3% increase in the commencement of construction for attached single-family homes during the year.
